summary: This is a brief product announcement for Fog Creek Copilot, a remote support tool. Joel announces that subscribers can now cobrand the Copilot interface with their own logo. The feature is aimed at tech support providers who want a seamless, branded experience for their clients. The post is essentially a marketing update with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: Fog Creek Copilot added a cobranding feature for subscribers
The feature allows companies to display their own logo in the support tool
The target audience is tech support providers serving external clients
money_quotes: Subscribers to Fog Creek Copilot can now cobrand Copilot with their own logo to provide seamless tech support to their clients.
key_insight: White-labeling and cobranding features help B2B tools feel seamless for end clients.
